description: Contract-level commissioning workflow for NC1 implementations and clients.

completion_criteria: Identity and platform groups are readable.
All required commissioning fields are set and validated.

validation_behavior.client_expectation: Clients should surface field-scoped issues and stage blockers distinctly.

commit_behavior.result: applies staged values and emits authoritative refresh requirement
commit_behavior.rollback_contract: On failure, response indicates whether prior committed revision remains active.

reset_behavior.notes: Full factory reset behavior is implementation-specific and not ratified in NC1 baseline.

post_commit_release_behavior.client_expectation: Clients must refresh profile/capability/config after commit before issuing operational commands.
